titleStmt.title: SII 11.145: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 145. (B.K. No. 78 of 1926-27.) SORAṬŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON ONE OF THE BEAMS BUILT INTO A WELL CALLED PANTARA-BHĀVI.

summary.p: This damaged and partly built-in inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and registers gifts of certain toll-incomes made to the temple of Grāmēśvaradēva by the Two-Hundred Mahājanas headed by the Ūroḍeya, the Ugura Three-Hundred, the Fifty Families of oilmen, the toll-officers, etc. Kēdāraśakti Paṇḍita, disciple of Bōḷa-Paṇḍita of Lokkiguṇḍi, received the gift. Mention is also made of the gift of the baṇṭa-paṇa by the Baṇṭa One-Thousand.
The date of the record is [Chāḷukya-Vikrama] year 23, Bahudhānya (= A.D. 1098-99), further details of which are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
bha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarō The
rūḍeya pramukha mahājana vinnūrvvaru miḻdu śrīmatu lokkiguṇdiya bōḷapaṇḍitara śiṣyaru kēdāraśaktipaṇḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhā rāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi grāmēśvara
maṁ biṭṭar . Īntenisi duguramūnūrvvaruṁ darṣanamaṁ dēvargge pēṟiṁge vīsa talevoṟe garevīsamaṁ biṭṭar . taḷāṟinoḷu dēvargge biṭṭa gadyā 1 pejjuṁkada perggaḍe karaṇaṁgaḷuṁ grāmēśvaradēvargge kuḷiyasuṁka
baraṁ biṭṭar telligarayvattokkaluṁ biṭṭa gāṇadalarddha sūllage Eṇneyaṁ tapōdhanara bhikṣeya kūḷiṁge koṭṭar Aydedeveṟuva taṁbuliga seṭṭi gaḷoḷagāgi keṟege pēṟiṁge vīsa hoṟe garevīsamaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ Īnnū
koṭṭa gadyā 1 tōṁṭagaḷoḷu phaḷāvaḷige kone vo 1 mēṁṭiAlu hoṟe 1 Akkasālikhā�jana bhāgadāyamaṁ poṁgeśavīsadalu halikeya ra bammiseṭṭi māṟugoṇḍu biṭṭa . 23 neya bahudhānya
doḷu phaṇamondu . Īntu negarttavetta baṁṭa sāsi rvvaruṁ dēvargge baṁṭavaṇama nācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ biṭṭar ©
Digital edition of SII 11.145 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
